title: hieracium nobile subsp. ibericum
intro: Hieracium nobile subsp. ibericum, also known as Noble Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Noble Hawkweed include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Noble Hawkweed can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
